overall.description: A cinematic game engine flythrough of a lush forest river valley with cascading waterfalls. The camera moves smoothly over the water toward a massive cliff face with multiple waterfalls, then pans across the misty rock formations. The scene features vibrant greens, crystal clear water, and dramatic sunlight filtering through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest river valley with mossy banks

events.description: camera stops forward movement and begins tilting upward to reveal the full waterfall cliff

agents.ego_description: flying smoothly over the river surface toward the waterfall, maintaining a low altitude above the water

entered.detail: clear flowing water with visible rocks beneath the surface
twin cascades falling down mossy rock face into the river
rocky bank covered in bright green moss and small vegetation
large pine trees rising above the river valley canopy

segments.scene_description: The camera glides smoothly over a crystal-clear forest river, approaching a waterfall in the distance. Lush green moss covers the rocky banks on either side, while tall trees frame the scene. The water flows gently around submerged rocks as the camera maintains a steady forward trajectory toward the cascading falls ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tall waterfall cliff with multiple cascades

events.description: perspective shifts from river-level view to looking up at the massive cliff face with multiple waterfalls
sun glare becomes prominent as camera pans toward the left side of the cliff face

agents.ego_description: panning slowly across the waterfall cliff face, capturing the scale and mist of the cascades from base to top

entered.detail: massive vertical rock wall with multiple tiers and ledges
numerous water streams cascading down different sections of the cliff
water mist rising from the base of the falls creating atmospheric haze
bright sunlight filtering over the cliff top creating lens flare

segments.scene_description: The camera now faces the massive cliff face head-on, revealing a complex system of multiple waterfalls cascading down the mossy rock wall. Sunlight streams over the cliff top creating dramatic backlighting and mist rises from the churning pool at the base. The camera pans slowly across the falls, showcasing the scale and power of the water features against the ancient stone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that glides from a serene forest river toward the overwhelming scale of a massive cliffside waterfall system. It begins by skimming over crystal-clear water, moving steadily between mossy banks and framing trees as the river flows around submerged rocks. As the camera maintains its forward trajectory, the distant sound of falling water grows and the view opens up to reveal a towering rock wall. The scene then shifts to a head-on perspective of the cliff face, where sunlight streams over the top to create dramatic backlighting through the rising mist. Finally, the camera pans slowly across the complex network of cascading falls, emphasizing the power of the water against the ancient, moss-covered stone.
